games.explanation: The market has WSN as a +220 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. LAD is the better team on paper — but the matchup favors WSN today.
The market has STL as a +150 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Michael McGreevy keeps STL competitive on the mound against Framber Valdez.
MIN is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Bailey Ober toes the rubber against Joe Boyle. Cold temps suppress the bats.
SFG is getting plus-money at +115 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Tyler Mahle keeps SFG competitive on the mound against Nolan McLean. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
